## Type of Change

<!-- Please check the options that apply. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklists

### Development
- [ ] I have ensured my code follows the project's Clean Architecture principles.
- [ ] I have maintained the offline-first requirement (no external cloud API calls without explicit user consent).
- [ ] I have added type hints to all new functions/classes.

### Testing
- [ ] I have run the test suite (`python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`) locally and all tests passed.
- [ ] I have added new unit tests to cover the functionality of my changes.
- [ ] The code coverage has not decreased.

### Documentation
- [ ] I have added concise docstrings for all new classes and methods.
- [ ] I have updated the README.md or relevant documentation if applicable.
